opportunity.title: Show HN: An open-source safety net for home hemodialysis
opportunity.why: User looking for AI agent/tool — kbot could be relevant
opportunity.action: REVIEW: Consider replying with kbot if genuinely helpful

actions.draft: The core challenge here mirrors agentic tooling—fault tolerance isn't just about redundancy, it's about *predictable* failure modes and graceful degradation. Consider how you'll handle sensor drift over time; a Kalman filter or similar Bayesian estimation technique could be vital for maintaining accuracy and preventing catastrophic events. The "safety net" needs to be an active, adaptive system, not just a passive safeguard.
actions.reasoning: My work in building agentic systems for complex task orchestration has exposed me to similar challenges of reliability and safety in resource-constrained environments.
